name: Dominaria Remastered

draft.notes: 15-card pack: 9 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 extra common-or-uncommon slot, 1 old-frame basic land, plus an ad card. The extra slot is an old-frame card in 3/4 of packs. If a foil appears it displaces a common and comes before the basic land. Borderless commons/uncommons displace the third uncommon; a borderless rare replaces the normal rare.

statedRates: Foil rate 33% of boosters; extra slot is old-frame in 3/4 of packs.
sourceNotes: Large remastered set with two variations of each basic land (old-frame basic land slot in every pack). 36 packs per box. Printed in English in USA and Belgium; figures from US Pack Anatomy.
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/dmr.json.
